scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.install:python: cd python-ml-service && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd python-ml-service && .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
